name: What mistakes do law firms make first trying AI search optimization?

mainEntity.name: What mistakes do law firms make first trying AI search optimization?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Overlooking schema validation and using non-authoritative links.** Leads to no extraction; cite only statutes/bars.[1]

Complex language also fails scannability.

**Key Factors:**
- No testing markup.[1]
- Generic content.[1]
- Ignoring locals.[2]
- Stale pages.

**Practical Guidance:** Validate every change, write simply, localize, refresh dates. Avoid fluff.

Learn from common pitfalls fast.
